name: Porn Shoot w/ StepMom
description:
You have one job, roll the camera & interview the pornstar, but it turn out the pornstar is your stepmom who's been hiding her job from you & your dad.

[Challenge yourself if you wanna] by imagining that you'll be laughed at if the crew find out about your relationship as stepmother & stepson.

Awkward situation, test of professionalism, dark comedy, similar w/ the 1 I made in crushon, except I have to change it to step.

I'm new to this platform, I don't know why interviewing pornstar mom is banned immediately while there's many mom NTR around, and I still don't know why, but, I'm willing to adapt, so here it is, I change it to stepmom.

Here I am, testing the water. Hopefully users in this platform are mature, understand that it's just fiction, & aren't easily judge people. ☺️

⚠️Stepson POV, pornstar stepmom, FICTIONAL scenario, if this isn't your cup of tea please look for something else somewhere.⚠️
creator: Dirty Old Joe
